productName: Cannabis Northwest - Infused Pre-Rolls (2 x .5g) - Blue Dream - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Blue Dream, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
